## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and refine office layout options for growthx.ai's new space, focusing on functionality, aesthetics, and practicality.](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Preferred layout: Option with bar area near entrance, large table for presentations/dining, and mix of collaborative and individual work spaces](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Prioritize ordering furniture (especially chairs and desks) immediately to make the space usable](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=3508.0)
  - [Iterate on the bar/kitchen area design to balance functionality and aesthetics](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=3274.0)
  - [Consider adding storage solutions (e.g., cubbies) and more individual work areas](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=3202.0)

## Topics

### Office Layout Options

  - [Three main layout options presented by Erik](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Focus on creating collaborative spaces, hosting areas, and flexible work environments](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Preferred option includes:](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
      - [Bar area near entrance for greeting and social interactions](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [Large table for presentations, dining, and collaborative work](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
      - [Mix of open seating and individual work areas](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
      - [Potential for 8 desks in main area](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)

### Functionality vs. Aesthetics

  - [Balancing the need for a polished, impressive space with practical work requirements](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating a welcoming environment for clients, VCs, and potential collaborators](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1999.0)
  - [Discussion on the importance of aesthetics in reflecting the company's creative capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)

### Furniture and Equipment

  - [Urgent need to order chairs and desks to make the space usable quickly](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=3508.0)
  - [Consideration of ergonomic and aesthetic factors in chair selection](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=3551.0)
  - [Discussion of various seating options: individual work pods, comfortable chairs with laptop tables, couches](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=2585.0)
  - [Debate on the necessity of a large central collaborative space vs. more individual workstations](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=2706.0)

### Storage and Practical Considerations

  - [Need for storage solutions, potentially incorporating lockable cubbies or storage behind couches](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=3079.0)
  - [Discussion of printer placement and paperless office concept](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=3174.0)
  - [Consideration of coffee/kitchenette placement for social interactions](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=3274.0)

### Technical Setup

  - [AT\&T internet installation scheduled for Tuesday (first circuit)](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=3777.0)
  - [Second circuit to be installed in 3-4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=3793.0)

  - [Continue refining central space furniture arrangement](https://fathom.video/share/niEG_EV4LE7zWuPnaUEWeGxrTjo5X9kx?tab=summary&timestamp=3671.0)
